Bluzelle’s February Mainnet Launch Will Make Room for Polkadot
articles.description: The decentralized database Bluzelle has announced the launch of its mainnet on Feb. 3, 2021. With the mainnet, Bluzelle will also begin actively integrating with various Polkadot-based projects.
